name: ChiroTouch Chiropractic Practice Management API
what_it_does: ChiroTouch REST API for chiropractic practice management and EHR software. Enables AI agents to manage chiropractic patient records and clinical documentation, handle SOAP note and outcome assessment workflows, manage appointment scheduling and recall programs, process chiropractic billing and insurance claims, access patient care plan and treatment progress data, handle auto accident and personal injury documentation, retrieve practice analytics, and integrate with chiropractic-specific billing clearinghouses and imaging systems.
use_cases: Managing chiropractic patient records and SOAP documentation from clinical coordination agents
Processing chiropractic insurance billing and claims from revenue cycle agents
Managing appointment scheduling and recall programs from patient engagement agents
Retrieving treatment progress and outcomes from clinical analytics agents
not_for: Non-chiropractic physical medicine without DC-specific documentation workflows
General primary care without chiropractic manipulation and treatment focus
Hospital-based chiropractic without outpatient private practice management
best_when: A chiropractic clinic or multi-doctor chiropractic practice using ChiroTouch wants AI agents to automate patient documentation, billing, scheduling, and recall management workflows.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Chiropractic patient clinical records are PHI. Auto accident and personal injury documentation may have additional legal sensitivities (attorney liens, litigation). BAA required for all agent access.

auth.notes: ChiroTouch uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Clinic-level credentials with patient, clinical, and billing scopes. Cloud-based platform with partner integration program. Limited public developer documentation. Acquired by Integrated Practice Solutions (2020).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — chiropractic practice subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-provider monthly pricing; multi-doctor practice pricing
pricing.notes: San Diego, California. Founded 1997. Market leader for chiropractic EHR. 35,000+ chiropractic practitioners. Cloud and on-premises versions. Competes with Genesis Chiropractic Software, Eclipse, and jane App for chiropractic practice management. Strong chiropractic billing expertise.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Chiropractic PHI — BAA required; personal injury records may have legal sensitivities
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with limited public documentation
No webhooks — polling required for appointment and clinical note updates
Auto accident and PI documentation requires careful handling due to attorney lien and litigation context
On-premises version has different API endpoint than cloud — verify deployment type
Chiropractic billing has specialty-specific codes (CPT 98940-98943) requiring domain expertise
agent_readiness.security_notes: Chiropractic PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Personal injury records have litigation sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Chiropractic PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required.
